pattern: Listing only the distinct orderings of a multiset means backtracking with a per-level rule that skips an element identical to one already tried at that position.
hints: Duplicates create repeated permutations, so the search must avoid choosing the same value twice for the same slot.
Sorting first puts equal values adjacent, which makes the skip condition a simple comparison with the previous element.
Sort nums; at each level, for equal values only the first unused one may be chosen (skip nums[i] when nums[i]==nums[i-1] and i-1 is currently unused), recurse, then backtrack.

edge_inputs.description: one repeated value collapses duplicate orderings
all distinct behaves like plain permutations
all identical yields a single ordering

stress.description: short array drawn from a tiny value pool so duplicates are common
stress.note: small value pool maximizes duplicate-suppression stress while keeping the count small
